name: ClawFlow
description: The n8n for agents. Declarative, AI-native workflow engine — LLM-writable, Cloudflare-portable.

apiKey.label: Anthropic API Key
apiKey.help: Used when ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var is not set

defaultAgent.label: Agent ID for do:agent nodes
defaultAgent.help: OpenClaw agent ID to delegate agent tasks to. Uses --local (embedded) if unset.

serve.label: Flow HTTP Server
serve.help: Start an HTTP server that runs flows on POST. Requires at least port. Endpoint: POST /<basePath>/<flowName>/run with the JSON body as the flow's inputs.

approval.label: Approval Gate
approval.help: Prompt the user before flow_run executes. Set enabled=false to disable entirely. Add session-key substrings to skipSessionPatterns to bypass for unattended hooks (e.g. "email" for inbound-email automation).
